name: FIREZ 1800 AR Glass Electric Fireplace
description: The FIREZ 1800 is designed to make a bold statement. With its impressive extra-wide flame display, it is the perfect choice for full-width media walls and larger living spaces, creating a truly luxurious centrepiece that instantly transforms any room. Featuring one of the most realistic 3D Reflectory Flame effects available, the FIREZ 1800 delivers the ambience and visual appeal of a real wood-burning fire—without the mess, maintenance or inconvenience.
